leadText: Whipped Cream (Japanese: ホイップクリーム Whipped Cream) is a type of ingredient introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making a sandwich .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A very sweet condiment. Folks in Paldea seem to love the varieties that really let the sweetness sing.
